debug_info.goal:
case succ
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
φ : Formula ℕ
hφ : φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
i : ℕ
ih :
  φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i →
    χ ➝ φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T ∨
      ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)),
        ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ) →
          Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
hi :
  φ ∈
    @LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction.match_1 (fun x => Set (Formula ℕ)) (decode i)
      (fun δ =>
        if
            ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)),
              ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i →
                Γ.conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T then
          insert δ (LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i)
        else LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i)
      fun _ => LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i
⊢ χ ➝ φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T ∨
    ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)),
      ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ) →
        Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T

failed_attempts: split at hi <;> try exact ih hi

. split at hi <;> rename_i h'
    . rcases hi with rfl | hi
      . right; rwa [encode_decode h]
      . exact ih hi
    . exact ih hi
  . exact ih hi

split at hi <;> rename_i h_dec
    · split_ifs at hi with h_cond
      · rcases hi with (rfl | hi)
        · right

split at hi <;> rename_i h_dec
    · split at hi <;> rename_i h_cond
      · rcases Set.mem_insert_iff.mp hi with (rfl | hi)
        · right

split at hi
    · rename_i δ h_dec
      split at hi
      · rename_i h_cond
        rcases hi with (rfl | h_in)
        · right

split at hi
    · rename_i δ h_dec
      split at hi
      · rename_i h_cond
        rcases hi with (rfl | hi)
        · right

split at hi <;> rename_i h_dec
      · split at hi <;> rename_i h_cond
        · rcases hi with (rfl | h_mem)
          · right

split at hi
    · next δ h_dec =>
      split at hi
      · next h_cond =>
        cases Set.mem_insert_iff.mp hi with
        | inl h => subst h; right

split at hi
    · rename_i δ h_dec; split at hi
      · rcases hi with (rfl | hi)
        · right; rwa [encode_decode h_dec]
        · exact ih hi
      · exact ih hi
    · exact ih hi
split at hi <;> try (exact ih hi)

split at hi <;> rename_i h
    · split at hi <;> rename_i h'
      · rcases hi with (rfl | hi)
        · right; rwa [encode_decode h]
        · exact ih hi
      · exact ih hi
    · exact ih hi

split at hi
    · next δ h_dec =>
      split at hi
      · next h_cond =>
        rcases hi with (rfl | h_in)
        · right

split at hi
    · next δ h =>
      split at hi
      · next h' =>
        simp at hi; rcases hi with (rfl | h_in)
        · right; rwa [encode_decode h]
        · exact ih h_in
      · exact ih hi
    · exact ih hi

split at hi <;> rename_i h
    · split at hi <;> rename_i h'
      · simp at hi; rcases hi with rfl | hi
        · right; rwa [encode_decode h]
        · exact ih hi
      · exact ih hi
    · exact ih hi
